ref: When the rest of the Lord's followers heard this, they prayed together and said: Master, you created heaven and earth, the sea, and everything in them.
text: G…Ы beluћГ kibui …Ыl…Ы, bakp…Ы oziћГ kitsuћА n…Ы bal…Ы Owusoso Akaa tikukulu m…Ы. Ba…Ц…Ф as…Ы, вАЬApalete…Ы g…Ы a≈ЛaћГ bukusi…Ы,вАЭ w…Фbh…Ыt…Ы kititiћА, kesiakpa, a∆Тu n…ЫћА k…Ыka nyia ka g…Ы kpas…Ы bal…Ы m…Ы.
translated: When this child was born, his father Owusoso Akaa named him Kitsun…Ы. One day he said, вАЬTomorrow he will go to school,вАЭ and he bought him a small slate, chalk, and a rubber so that he could begin his lessons.

ref: The next day they arrived in Caesarea where Cornelius was waiting for them. He had also invited his relatives and close friends.
text: Bediku Kaisarea n…Ы kelizazaa m…ЫћА. Kornelio eze…Цi bal…Ы kidzo m…Ы kliso ekulu y…Ыeshopo al…Ы n…ЫћА y…Ы…Фbhia al…Ы eshogoћА.
translated: Caesarea was a city. Cornelius was a centurion who feared God and gave alms to the people.

ref: Many who were followers now started telling everyone about the evil things they had been doing.
text: Otsi al…Ы ban…Ф kpekpeћА…Ы g…Ы ay…Ыk…Ы a≈ЛaћГ bege kpuћГ bal…Ыishu k…Ыl…Ы babadal…Ы bal…Ы ishum…Ы n…Ы bal…Ы ebui kpa g…Ы bah…Ыt…Ы shu.
translated: The child went to the farm and found that the yam had been stolen by a baboon, so he ran home to tell his father.

ref: They answered, вАЬCaptain Cornelius sent us. He is a good man who worships God and is liked by the Jewish people. One of God's holy angels told Cornelius to send for you, so he could hear what you have to say.вАЭ
text: Bany…Ы ebuiliuluћГ as…Ы, вАЬBude Keyuiza otugbaћАn…Ф Kornelio …Фk…Ф. Enu an…Ф g…Ы y…Ыishu dal…Ы p…Ы esi Owusoso Akaa n…ЫifuћА, an…Ф g…Ы Yudan…Ы petee ad…Ыm…Ы y…Ыibui. translated: The elders said, вАЬCorneliusвАЩs servant went to call Cornelius. When he came, he told him that the angel of God had said to him that all the Jews had been chosen. From that day on, he should listen to what Peter would say to him and do what Peter told him to do.вАЭ

ref: When he tried to disgrace the temple, we arrested him. If you question him, you will find out for yourself that our charges are true.
